name: Power REIT
summary: PART I . General Power REIT (the Registrant or the Trust, and together with its consolidated subsidiaries or Power REIT, unless the context requires otherwise) is a Maryland-domiciled, internally-managed real estate investment trust (a REIT) that owns a portfolio of real estate assets related to transportation, energy infrastructure and Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) in the United States.
